MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,152.09 FILED BY KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, RENE DBA ESPECTRUM COLOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, RENE DBA ESPECTRUM COLOR $1,152.09 PRINCIPAL, $100.41 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,252.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
